empty_pages: Welcome page (ID 6): Had 0 bytes content - restored from local export (13,802 chars)
Select Role page (ID 49): Had 0 bytes content - created simple redirect page (2,789 chars)
Register Profile page (ID 50): Verified 16,684 chars (correct size)
database_issues: Custom tables created without wp_ prefix (td_user_data_change_requests, td_id_sequences, td_audit_log)
Fixed: Renamed all tables to wp_td_* to match WordPress convention and $wpdb expectations
Fixed (Feb 23): Updated td-registration-handler.php to use dynamic prefix (commit 19bf728f)
Fixed (Feb 23): Updated user-requests-display.php to use dynamic prefix (commit aea1393f)
Result: 8 existing registration records preserved, AJAX handler works, ID generation works
Pattern: SQL schemas define unprefixed tables (td_*), PHP uses {$wpdb->prefix}td_*
css_missing: Fixed (Feb 23): Manually uploaded registration-form.css via SCP
phone_pattern_issue: Phone field pattern='[0-9+\s\-()]+' caused browser warning
Issue: Invalid regex character class in pattern attribute
Status: CSS deployed but pattern fix pending (low priority, doesn't block submission)
manager_actions_table_error: Manager Actions page shows 'Database Table Not Found' error
Root cause: user-requests-display.php table check query not working correctly
Status: PENDING - user-requests-display.php deployed (commit aea1393f) but still showing error
Next: Verify SHOW TABLES LIKE query logic, check production deployment
registration_spinner_issue: Register Profile page spinner stuck on 'Loading security token...' indefinitely
Root cause: JavaScript file (registration-form.js) not being enqueued
Problem: functions.php used hardcoded page ID check is_page(21) but local page is ID 28, production is ID 50
Impact: Without JavaScript, spinner created by HTML but never hidden, nonce never fetched, form never interactive
Fixed (Feb 24): Replaced is_page() with get_queried_object() for reliable page detection
Result: JavaScript now loads correctly across all environments without hardcoded IDs
Lesson: Never hardcode page IDs in theme code - use slugs with get_queried_object()
missing_nonce_field_id: AJAX nonce loaded successfully but JavaScript couldn't populate field
Root cause: Hidden input had name='td_registration_nonce' but NO id attribute
Impact: Nonce field remained empty despite successful AJAX response
Fixed (Feb 24): Added id='td_registration_nonce' to hidden input field
Method: wp eval-file with str_replace to add id attribute
Result: JavaScript now successfully populates nonce field
Lesson: HTML elements need BOTH name (form submission) AND id (JavaScript selectors)
role_parameter_mismatch: Form submission error: 'Required field missing td_user_role'
Root cause: Select-role template sent unprefixed values (candidate) but handler expected prefixed (td_candidate)
Problem: page-role-selection.php dropdown had <option value='candidate'> instead of <option value='td_candidate'>
Impact: URL parameter ?td_user_role=candidate didn't match database role names (td_candidate, td_employer, td_scout)
Fixed (Feb 24): Updated template dropdown values to use td_ prefix
Alternative rejected: JavaScript conversion (adds complexity, not fixing root cause)
Result: Clean data flow from selection to registration to database
Status: ✅ RESOLVED - All 6 registration fixes complete
wordpress_html_block_stripping_hidden_fi: Form submission error: 'Required field missing td_user_role' persisted after previous fixes
Console showed: '📋 Role input field found: false' - field never rendered
Root cause: WordPress HTML blocks strip <input type='hidden'> tags for security
Problem: Hidden fields defined in page content but never appearing in DOM
Discovery: Browser DevTools showed hidden fields COMPLETELY MISSING from rendered page
Fixed (Feb 24): Dynamic field creation via JavaScript
Solution: JavaScript creates td_user_role and action fields on page load if missing
Result: Hidden fields created dynamically, bypassing WordPress security restrictions
Impact: Registration now works in fresh environments and after database resets
Lesson: WordPress HTML blocks have security filtering - create critical fields via JS
duplicate_inline_javascript_conflict: Conflicting JavaScript code causing unpredictable behavior
Root cause: Page had BOTH inline <script> block (7KB) AND external registration-form.js
Problem: Duplicate event handlers, variable conflicts, unpredictable execution order
Discovery: Page content from database contained 25KB HTML including full inline script
Fixed (Feb 24): Removed inline script via wp eval-file
Result: 7KB of duplicate code removed, external JS now sole source of truth
Backup: restore/pages/register-profile-28.html updated with clean version
Lesson: Never mix inline and external JavaScript for same functionality
table_name_prefix_mu_plugins: Manager Actions page showing 'Database Table Not Found' despite table existing
Root cause: MU plugins using hardcoded 'td_user_data_change_requests' without wp_ prefix
Problem: SHOW TABLES LIKE query checking for wrong name (missing wp_)
Discovery: Table exists as wp_td_user_data_change_requests but code checked td_*
Fixed (Feb 24): Use $wpdb->prefix for dynamic prefix in all MU plugins
Result: Manager Actions page now displays user requests correctly
Impact: Future-proof for any WordPress installation (not hardcoded to wp_ prefix)
Lesson: Always use $wpdb->prefix . 'table_name' pattern in WordPress plugins
hierarchical_page_urls: Manager pages needed proper URL structure /managers/admin and /managers/actions
Status: Pages existed with short slugs 'admin' (ID 26) and 'actions' (ID 27)
Fixed (Feb 24): Set post_parent=24 (Managers page) for both pages
Method: wp post update 26 --post_parent=24 && wp post update 27 --post_parent=24
Links: Managers landing page already had correct /managers/* links
Permalinks: Flushed with wp rewrite flush to activate new structure
Impact: Clean URL hierarchy matches intended information architecture

description: Complete user registration system with production-grade validation, JavaScript externalization (registration form + manager actions), deployment verification workflow, nonce security, retry logic, loading states, and 6 critical registration fixes (Feb 24: spinner, nonce, role parameter, dynamic fields, duplicate JS, table prefixes)

pages.name: Register Profile
changes: Created custom HTML registration form (replaces Forminator approach)
Two-checkbox implementation: 'I have a LinkedIn profile' + 'I have a CV to upload'
Conditional field display: LinkedIn URL shows when LinkedIn checkbox checked, CV upload shows when CV checkbox checked
Validation: At least one checkbox must be selected
Navy hero section with white heading
White card form container (800px max-width, 48px padding)
13 form fields: 5 personal info (first, middle, last, email, phone), 2 professional checkboxes + conditional fields, 2 identity docs + conditional residence ID, consent
Custom file upload buttons with navy gradient styling
Filename display after file selection
Trust badges footer (4 SVG icons: Secure, GDPR, Legal, EU Standards)
JavaScript: URL parameter reading, conditional toggles, validation logic
ADDED Feb 21: Dynamic nonce loading via AJAX with retry logic (3 attempts, exponential backoff 2s/4s/8s)
ADDED Feb 21: Loading spinner during nonce fetch with form disable
ADDED Feb 21: Comprehensive client-side validation (email regex, phone min 8 digits, LinkedIn URL format, file size 5MB max, file type checking)
ADDED Feb 21: Real-time validation on blur for email/phone/LinkedIn fields
ADDED Feb 21: File validation on selection with instant feedback and file size display
ADDED Feb 21: Visual feedback (red borders for errors, green for success, file size in KB)
FIXED Feb 24: Added id='td_registration_nonce' to hidden nonce field (JavaScript selector requirement)
FIXED Feb 24: JavaScript enqueuing now uses get_queried_object() instead of hardcoded page ID
FIXED Feb 24: Added comprehensive debug logging (initialization, AJAX, form data)
Status: Spinner fix complete, nonce fix complete, td_user_role parameter debugging in progress

code.purpose: AJAX handler for custom registration form - CHANGED: Now creates change requests instead of WordPress users
breaking_changes: CRITICAL ARCHITECTURE CHANGE: Registration NO LONGER creates WordPress users
NEW: Inserts records into td_user_data_change_requests table
NEW: Files uploaded to /registration-pending/ directory (not media library)
NEW: Status set to 'new' (visible in Manager Actions immediately)
workflow: NO WordPress users created at any stage
features: Processes td_process_registration AJAX action
Validates nonce and required fields
Checks at least one of LinkedIn/CV provided
Uploads files to /wp-content/uploads/registration-pending/ with .htaccess protection
Creates change request record with request_id, user data, file paths
Sets status='new' and request_type='register'
Visible in Manager Actions 'New' tab immediately
Returns JSON with request_id and status

code.purpose: Shortcode for displaying registration requests in Manager Actions page
features: Queries td_user_data_change_requests table
Shows records where status='new' OR (status='pending' AND assigned_to IS NULL)
Displays request_id, name, email, role, submitted_date, action buttons

code.purpose: Atomic ID sequence generation for USRQ/PRSN/CMPY IDs
features: td_generate_request_id() function
Uses td_id_sequences table for daily-reset atomic sequences
Format: USRQ-YYMMDD-NNNN (e.g., USRQ-260220-0001)

scripts.purpose: Pre-commit deployment verification - analyzes git changes and categorizes deployment requirements
features: Analyzes new untracked files (git ls-files --others)
Analyzes modified tracked files (git diff --name-only HEAD)
Checks recent page backups (last 24 hours)
Categorizes: Auto-deploy vs Manual deployment
Provides review questions based on detected changes
Outputs summary with next steps
Exit codes: 0 (all auto-deployable), 1 (manual steps required)

content: Infinite spinner root cause analysis (JavaScript not loading)
Missing nonce field ID attribute fix

Lesson 2: HTML element IDs required for JavaScript selectors
Lesson 3: Custom templates override page content

commands: STEP 0: Run pre-commit verification: powershell infra/shared/scripts/verify-deployment-readiness.ps1
STEP 1: Deploy code (auto): git add wp-content/ && git commit -m 'v3.6.3: Registration fixes + Manager pages + JS externalization' && git push origin main
STEP 2: Wait 30 seconds for Hostinger Git auto-deployment
STEP 3: Deploy Manager Actions page (ID 36) with JavaScript externalization
STEP 4: Deploy Manager Admin page (ID 38) with latest updates
STEP 5: Deploy register-profile page (ID 50) with spinner fix, nonce fix, debug logging (CRITICAL - UPDATED Feb 24)
STEP 6: Deploy select-role page (ID 49) with template fix (UPDATED Feb 24)
STEP 7: Verify functions.php deployed correctly (CRITICAL - Check version 1.0.6, get_queried_object fix)
STEP 8: Verify registration-form.js deployed (CRITICAL - Check v1.0.6, 548+ lines, debug logging present)
STEP 9: Verify page-role-selection.php template deployed (Check td_ prefix in dropdown values)
STEP 10: Deploy td-registration-handler.php v2.0.0 to wp-content/mu-plugins/
STEP 11: Deploy manager-actions-display.php to wp-content/mu-plugins/
STEP 12: Deploy record-id-generator.php to wp-content/mu-plugins/
STEP 13: Deploy td-manager-actions-assets.php MU plugin
STEP 14: Deploy SVG assets to wp-content/themes/blocksy-child/assets/images/ (4 icons)
STEP 15: Deploy CSS to production (registration-form.css, manager-actions-tabs.css)
STEP 16: Verify td_user_data_change_requests table exists in production
STEP 17: Verify td_id_sequences table exists in production
STEP 18: Test registration flow end-to-end (select role → nonce loads → form validates → submission works)
STEP 19: Check DevTools console for debug logging (script load, init, AJAX, form submission)
STEP 20: Remove Forminator plugin (deactivate + delete)
STEP 21: Remove WPForms Lite plugin (deactivate + delete)
STEP 22: Clear LiteSpeed Cache
STEP 23: Test registration from multiple role types (Candidate, Employer, Scout)
